name: World Cup Games
description: Live scores, fixtures and results for the FIFA World Cup. Browse previous, today's and upcoming matches, with goal scorers, lineups and a match-detail view.

fields.name: title
fields.label: Widget title
fields.description: Shown above the match list. Leave empty to hide.

fields.name: daysAhead
fields.label: Days ahead to browse
fields.description: How many future days the day pager can reach (0 = today only).

fields.name: daysBehind
fields.label: Days behind to browse
fields.description: How many previous days the day pager can reach (0 = no past days).

fields.name: maxScorersShown
fields.label: Scorers shown per match
fields.description: Goal scorers listed under each match before the "+n more" link (0 = hide scorers).

fields.name: showLineups
fields.label: Show lineups in match detail
fields.description: Load team lineups and formation in the match-detail view (when announced).

fields.name: accentColor
fields.label: Accent colour override
fields.description: Leave empty to use your Appspace brand colour.

fields.name: livePollSeconds
fields.label: Live refresh interval (seconds)
fields.description: How often scores refresh while a match is in play.

fields.name: idlePollMinutes
fields.label: Idle refresh interval (minutes)
fields.description: How often fixtures refresh when nothing is live.
